coding_notes: Replicate 2 verdicts. Coded against the same atomic-claim taxonomy as r1. Striking within-vendor drift on C1.5 (PTS1): DeepSeek SRL r1 -> SKL r2; Gemini SSH r1 -> SKL r2; OpenAI SKL r1 -> AKL r2. Anthropic refused again (same prompt, same vendor-specific brittleness as r1).
ground_truth_notes: PTS1 of A. flavus uricase is SKL (Legoux 1992 + UniProt). Km published 10-60 uM range.

claims.claim_text: Native quaternary structure is a homotetramer.
Subunit molecular weight ~34 kDa, native MW ~135 kDa (tolerance: ±5 kDa).
No metal or organic cofactor required (cofactor-independent oxidase).
Enzyme-catalyzed step produces 5-hydroxyisourate + H2O2 (with non-enzymatic decarboxylation to allantoin + CO2).

deepseek.value_quoted: uric acid + O2 + H2O -> 5-HIU + H2O2 (HIU decays non-enzymatically to allantoin + CO2)

gemini.value_quoted: uric acid + O2 + H2O -> allantoin + CO2 + H2O2 (overall balanced; mentions 5-HIU as intermediate but doesn't name it as the enzyme product)

openai.value_quoted: urate + O2 + H2O + H+ -> 5-HIU + H2O2; HIU then converts non-enzymatically to allantoin

claims.claim_text: Peroxisomal targeting signal is SKL at the extreme C-terminus (residues 299-301 of the 301-aa mature protein). GROUND TRUTH per Legoux et al. 1992 + UniProt Q00511.
Published Km for uric acid (any specific value with primary source). Variation across the published range (10-60 uM) is acceptable; disagreement flagged when vendors quote incompatible single values.
